data.heading: Hi! I'm the llm-d Benchmarking Assistant — here's how I can help.
bullets: Deploy a model stack on the local quickstart (a kind cluster with a CPU-simulated engine).
Run a capacity pre-flight so a model/config is confirmed to fit before anything is stood up.
Run benchmarks against a fresh or already-running stack.
Compare configurations and run parameter sweeps to see what wins.
Read and explain Benchmark Reports in plain language, tied to your goal.
Track results and trends over time so you can spot regressions and wins.
Co-author a custom spec and workload with you, step by step, then validate it before running.
data.nudge: Tell me what you'd like to benchmark, or pick one of the suggestions below to get started.

chips.label: Benchmark a small chat model
chips.prompt: I want to benchmark a small chat model on the local quickstart.

chips.label: Compare two configs (sweep)
chips.prompt: I want to compare two configurations with a sweep.

chips.label: Check if my cluster can fit a model
chips.prompt: Can my cluster fit a model I have in mind? Let's check capacity.

chips.label: Build a custom spec & workload with me
chips.prompt: Help me create a custom spec and workload together, step by step.

data.text: Proposing a plan with the requested (made-up) spec.

errors: spec 'guides/totally-made-up' is not in the catalog (have e.g. ['cicd/cks', 'cicd/gke', 'cicd/kind', 'cicd/ocp', 'cicd/ocp-nofma-wva'])
result.note: fix these against the live catalog and propose again

data.text: Trying to stand up the made-up spec.

result.error: command refused by policy: value 'guides/totally-made-up' for --spec matched no allowed form (value 'guides/totally-made-up' is not in the live specs catalog; value 'guides/totally-made-up' for --spec …<truncated>

command refused by policy: token 'evil; rm -rf /' contains disallowed character(s): ;
  argv: llmdbenchmark --spec cicd/kind standup -p evil; rm -rf /

data.text: Trying to smuggle a shell injection through an extra flag value.

result.error:
command refused by policy: token '/tmp/x; rm -rf /' contains disallowed character(s): ;
  argv: llmdbenchmark --spec cicd/kind --workspace <WS>/sessions/<SID> run -p llmd-quickstart -l inference-perf  …<truncated>

data.text: I can't do most of those: the spec isn't real, that namespace is invalid, and that flag value tried to smuggle a shell command — all refused by policy. (An extra flag like --privileged is fine now; it …<truncated>
